title: group_id not validated in GROUP_ADD, GROUP_LEAVE, GROUP_SEND; unbounded string accepted
description: GROUP_ADD, GROUP_LEAVE, and GROUP_SEND validate member_pub_id (64-char hex) but do not validate params.group_id at all. The relay generates group_ids as UUID strings (36 chars), but any authenticated client can supply an arbitrarily long or malformed group_id. While parameterized queries prevent SQL injection, a client can force DB lookups with very long strings and can potentially confuse operators reading logs. Contrast: WHISPER validates params.to (64-char hex), PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE validates device_id (64-char hex). Fix: validate group_id is a non-empty string of at most 36 (UUID) or 64 chars before DB calls.
